character.name:
7 year old child adventurer, small brave kid, solarpunk fantasy world,
oversized leather sword on back almost too big for him, hand-me-down leather
armor wrapped with trained vines that are slightly too loose, messy afro hair,
determined expression on a young face, seed pouch belt, worn bark-and-leather
boots, short tattered plant-fiber cloak dragging slightly on the ground,
small hands gripping sword handle made of living root, warm brown and forest
green palette, hand-painted storybook illustration style, full body character
design, strong readable silhouette, the feeling of a child on a big adventure,
clean background
